heading: Hinnomunjie vs Hoddles Creek — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Hinnomunjie, Victoria and Hoddles Creek, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Hoddles Creek has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to Hinnomunjie (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Hinnomunjie or Hoddles Creek safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Hinnomunjie has a flood risk score of 56/100, while Hoddles Creek scores 45/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Hinnomunjie scores 44/100 for bushfire risk. Hoddles Creek scores 44/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Hinnomunjie or Hoddles Creek?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Hoddles Creek has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.5% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
